statement: In every magma, Equation 1362 (`x = y * (((z * x) * w) * y)`) implies Equation 3324 (`x * y = x * (y * (z * w))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0115
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z x) w) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op x (op y (op z w)))
